loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,
( select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and collateral_no = '1' ) as ref_own_no_1 , /*คนค้ำที่ 1*/
( select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and collateral_no = '2' ) as ref_own_no_2 , /*คนค้ำที่ 2*/
( select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and collateral_no = '3' ) as ref_own_no_3 ,/*คนค้ำที่ 3*/
( select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and collateral_no = '4' ) as ref_own_no_4 ,/*คนค้ำที่ 4*/
( select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and collateral_no = '5' ) as ref_own_no_5 ,/*คนค้ำที่ 5*/
pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD') as begining_of_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'YYYY') as begining_of_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begining_of_month, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint, sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share, si_security_user.user_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount
,coalesce((select sum(principal_of_loan) from sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'ฉ' and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1'),0) as principal_of_loan
,coalesce((select sum(interest_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'ฉ' and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1'),0) as interest_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_req_fee, si_security_user, sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) and ( sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no between 'ส65000012' and 'ส65000012') --and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract >= '18/1/2022' ) order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no

r_amnat_req_contract_detail_by_conno_nes.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as coll_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no <> {1}) ) /*"WHERE*/

SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as coll_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no <> {1}) ) /*"WHERE*/

SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as coll_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no <> {1}) ) /*"WHERE*/

SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as coll_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no <> {1}) ) /*"WHERE*/

SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as coll_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no <> {1}) ) /*"WHERE*/
